name: plan-and-delegate
description: Multi-lane orchestration shape: goal, plan, open-team, coordinate, converge, close. Each stage is a literal maddu invocation so the run populates the Plans, Pipelines, Reviews, and Cost cockpit routes for a coordinated team.

stages.name: goal
stages.intent: Set the top-level goal. `maddu goal set "<multi-phase objective>"` so every downstream phase and lane traces back to it.

stages.name: plan
stages.intent: Build a lane-disjoint plan. `maddu plan new "<objective>"`, then `maddu plan add-phase <plan-id> "<phase>"` per phase, keeping the lanes the phases map to disjoint so workers never contend for the same lane.

stages.name: open-team
stages.intent: Open a team across the planned lanes. `maddu team open --members <N> --lanes "<lane-a>,<lane-b>,..."` (N must equal the lane count; lanes must be disjoint) to provision concurrent worker slots.

stages.name: coordinate
stages.intent: Dispatch the coordinator over the team. `maddu coordinator <plan-id> --runtime claude-code` to drive phases across lanes; surfaces in the cockpit Pipelines route.

stages.name: converge
stages.intent: Review each completed phase as it lands. `maddu review run --slice <slice-event-id>`, then `maddu plan complete-phase <plan-id>` (next open phase; pass a phase number to target one) for each converged phase.

stages.name: close
stages.intent: Close the team and account for the run. `maddu team close --team-id <team-id>`, then `maddu cost` to record spend, then `maddu plan complete <plan-id>` to mark the objective done.
